title: Agri-Tech Innovation Program
description: Collaborative research combining biotechnology and agricultural science to develop climate-resilient crop varieties for Tangail region farmers.

title: Water Quality Monitoring Network
description: IoT-enabled sensor network deployed across 12 rivers in Tangail district, providing real-time data on water contamination and flood risk.

title: AI for Public Health Diagnostics
description: Deep learning models trained on local clinical datasets for early detection of dengue, diabetes, and respiratory diseases in rural Bangladesh.

title: Renewable Energy Systems Lab
description: Design and deployment of hybrid solar-wind microgrids for off-grid rural electrification, with pilot installations in 4 Tangail sub-districts.

title: Genomics & Bioinformatics Research
description: Population-level genomic studies in partnership with public hospitals, focusing on hereditary disease prevalence in Bangladesh's central region.

title: Smart & Sustainable Urban Planning
description: GIS-based spatial analysis of urbanization patterns in Tangail, informing policy on green infrastructure, traffic management, and housing equity.
